data.body: Plan-review PASS (advisory=11, signed). Triage: (1) CANONICAL_LLM edit target (2 findings + test_criteria_overlay.py parity) — adding 'removal-rationale' to CANONICAL_LLM in registry.py. (2) exec ambiguity ('1-TURN or agentic') — resolved to routing exec:AGENT (G6: Trigger 3 intent-markers + the grounded-scenario 'NOT invented' check need to read source/tests/blame, which a 1-TURN call cannot; 'agentic' is the prompt front-matter execution_mode, distinct from the routing exec value which is AGENT). (3) id format — 'removal-rationale' (hyphen) is REQUIRED: file plan_review_removal_rationale.md -> stem _->-  gives prompt id plan-review-removal-rationale, which matches criterion_prompt_id('removal-rationale'); an underscore id would mismatch. hedge already proved lowercase ids work. (4) doc ACs get grep-checkable proofs; (5) naming the 5 unnamed recall tests (removal_rationale_intent_marker/_fabricated/_advisory/_move6/_e5_overlap). (6) 'low validity' threshold -> assert removal_scenario_grounded in {no,insufficient} for an invented scenario.
